name: @peanut996/acp-router
description: Generic MCP server for routing coding tasks to local ACP agents. Works with any MCP client (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, Codex, etc.).

scripts.check: node --check ./bin/acp-router.mjs && node --check ./bin/acp-router-cli.mjs && node --check ./mcp/constants.mjs && node --check ./mcp/utils.mjs && node --check ./mcp/storage.mjs && node --check ./mcp/agents.mjs && node --check ./mcp/acp-client.mjs && node --check ./mcp/jobs.mjs && node --check ./mcp/server.mjs && node -e "import('./mcp/server.mjs')"
